channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: BC teammates Hagens, Leonard each score twice, US routs Switzerland 7-2 in world junior quarterfinal
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Boston College teammates James Hagens and Ryan Leonard each scored twice and the defending champion United States routed Switzerland 7-2 on Thursday in the world junior hockey quarterfinals.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alabama QB Jalen Milroe and LB Jihaad Campbell declare for NFL draft after bowl loss
item.description: TUSCALOOSA, Ala. (AP) — Alabama quarterback Jalen Milroe and linebacker Jihaad Campbell are entering the NFL draft. Milroe and Campbell announced decisions to skip their final seasons Thursday on social media, two days after the Crimson Tide fell to Michigan 19-13 in the ReliaQuest Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Caitlin Clark reveals 'welcome to the W' moment when she was injured early in 2024 season
item.description: During an appearance on Travis and Jason Kelce's podcast, Caitlin Clark revealed the moment when she knew she'd entered the pros during the 2024 season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Big 12 commissioner calls for 'national standards' for calling targeting after controversial play
item.description: Big 12 commissioner Brett Yormark is calling for more consistency on what constitutes a targeting penalty after no call was made on Texas safety Michael Taaffe’s high hit on Arizona State receiver Melquan Stovall late in the College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Peach Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Surging Ohio State to face tenacious Texas in the Cotton Bowl for a spot in the CFP title game
item.description: PASADENA, Calif. (AP) — Texas will be a whole lot closer to home than Ohio State in the Cotton Bowl. The Buckeyes appear to be a whole lot closer to Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Alabama quarterback Jalen Milroe declares for NFL Draft
item.description: Alabama quarterback Jalen Milroe, after two full seasons of going under center for the Crimson Tide, has announced his plans to enter the 2025 NFL Draft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Saints, Pelicans announce member of video production team among those killed in New Orleans terrorist attack
item.description: The New Orleans Saints and Pelicans announced a member of their video production team with ASM New Orleans was killed in the terror attack on New Year's Day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Superdome re-opens from lockdown for the Sugar Bowl CFP quarterfinal between Georgia and Notre Dame
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Ticketed fans in Georgia and Notre Dame gear packed a plaza adjacent to the Superdome, enjoyed music under clear skies — and under the watch of snipers on rooftops — before filtering into the stadium for Thursday afternoon's College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Sugar Bowl.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Pistons guard Jaden Ivey has surgery on leg he broke in collision vs. Magic
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Detroit Pistons guard Jaden Ivey had surgery on his left leg, a day after breaking his fibula in a collision during a win over the Orlando Magic. The Pistons said Thursday that Ivey will be reevaluated in four weeks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ex-NFL star Antonio Brown launches fundraiser for New Orleans terror attack victims' families
item.description: Former NFL star Antonio Brown launched a fund for the families of the victims in the New Orleans terror attack. More than a dozen were killed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No. 6 Ohio State routs top-ranked Oregon 41-21 in the Rose Bowl, advances to CFP semifinals
item.description: PASADENA, Calif. (AP) — Second chances don’t come around often in life, Ohio State coach Ryan Day told his players in a team meeting before the Rose Bowl.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jaden Ivey injures leg in 4th quarter in Pistons' victory over the Magic
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Jaden Ivey sustained what appeared to be a serious leg injury after scoring 22 points in the Detroit Pistons' 105-96 victory over the Orlando Magic on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: DAVE HOGG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sugar Bowl CFP quarterfinal between Georgia and Notre Dame postponed after deadly truck attack
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Sugar Bowl between Georgia and Notre Dame was postponed a day because of an attack about a mile away from the Superdome early Wednesday, when authorities say a truck driver deliberately plowed into a New Year’s crowd and killed 15 p
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron James' youngest son Bryce commits to Arizona
item.description: Bryce James, son of NBA star LeBron James, is heading to Arizona. Bryce James announced his decision Wednesday on Instagram and his father had a quick response.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sugar Bowl postponed after deadly truck attack
item.description: NEW ORLEANS — The College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Sugar Bowl between Georgia and Notre Dame has been postponed after a truck plowed into a New Year’s crowd about a mile away early Wednesday, killing at least 10 people.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Blues have all the fun in convincing victory over the Blackhawks in the Winter Classic
item.description: The Winter Classic returned to Wrigley on the final day of 2024, and the Chicago Blackhawks threw quite a party but ended up on the losing end.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: How the Chicago Blackhawks brought the St. Louis Blues to life
item.description: As the St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks gear up for the 2025 NHL Winter Classic, it's worth revisiting a fascinating piece of hockey history: The Blues franchise, as St. Louis knows it today, might not exist without a helping hand from their cross-state rival.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: VIDEO: A jet carrying the Gonzaga men's basketball team ordered to stop to avoid collision at LAX
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Federal Aviation Administration has launched an investigation after a private jet carrying the Gonzaga University men’s basketball team nearly crossed a runway as another flight was taking off Friday at Los Angeles International Airport.
item.dc:creator: STEFANIE DAZIO and JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 2024 Holiday Bowl: Homegrown Cougars leave it all on the field in front of hometown crowd
item.description: While a depleted Washington State may not have tasted any eggnog this year in the Holiday Bowl after falling short to Syracuse 52-35, a few San Diego locals still making a memory of a lifetime playing on the big stage in front of their hometown crowd.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Darnold gives Vikings another gem with career-high 377 yards in 27-25 win over Packers
item.description: The Minnesota Vikings were ready to start their postgame ritual in honor of a ninth consecutive victory before realizing Sam Darnold was still missing from the raucous locker room because he was finishing his interview with the TV broadcasting crew.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NFC's No. 1 seed comes down to Vikings-Lions showdown at Detroit in Week 18
item.description: The NFC’s No. 1 seed will come down to the final game of the regular season when the Detroit Lions host the Minnesota Vikings next Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lakers send D'Angelo Russell to Nets in trade for Dorian Finney-Smith, Shake Milton
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers have traded guard D'Angelo Russell to the Brooklyn Nets for forward Dorian Finney-Smith and guard Shake Milton. The Lakers also sent forward Maxwell Lewis and three second-round draft picks to Brooklyn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Cubs deal former 1B prospect Matt Mervis to Marlins for utilityman
item.description: The Cubs have traded one former infield prospect for another. ESPN's Jeff Passan reported on his X feed early Sunday afternoon that the Cubs have dealt first baseman Matt Mervis to the Miami Marlins for utilityman Vidal Bruján, according to sources.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Point and Kucherov lead surging Lightning to 6-2 win over reeling Rangers
item.description: Brayden Point and Nikita Kucherov each had a goal and two assists to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning past the reeling New York Rangers 6-2 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Syracuse defeats Washington State in DIRECTV Holiday Bowl
item.description: Syracuse quarterback Kyle McCord put on a stellar performance Friday to help his team win the DIRECTV Holiday Bowl at Snapdragon Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5
